enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Pollapaiyya?

Pollapaiyya expresses the playful and romantic feelings between lovers, highlighting their affection and connection.

What is the context of the song in the movie Rekka?

The song is featured in a romantic setting, showcasing the chemistry between the lead characters as they celebrate their love.

Who are the singers of Pollapaiyya?

The song is beautifully sung by Haricharan and Shweta Mohan, whose voices complement each other perfectly.

Who composed the music for Rekka?

The music for Rekka was composed by D Imman, known for his melodious tunes and engaging compositions.

When was Pollapaiyya released?

Pollapaiyya was released on September 29, 2016, as part of the movie Rekka.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Pollapaiyya, the vibrant energy of love is beautifully captured through the playful lyrics and melodious tunes. The song serves as a celebration of romance, showcasing the joyful moments shared between the lead characters in Rekka. With its upbeat rhythm and heartfelt expressions, it evokes feelings of happiness and affection. This duet not only highlights the chemistry between the singers but also resonates with anyone who has experienced the joy of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Pollapaiyya from Rekka is a delightful duet that captures the essence of romance with its catchy beats and heartfelt lyrics. The collaboration between Haricharan and Shweta Mohan brings a unique charm, making it a perfect addition to any celebration. Dive into the vibrant world of love with this enchanting track that resonates with joy and happiness.
stanzaMeanings: Hey boy, hey boy, what should I say? I can't say anything, you are the one who blooms inside.
What is it that I feel inside? It's not something that can be easily expressed.
When the fire comes, it won't just go away easily.
I was born to you, and I will live together with you.
Hey boy, hey boy, what should I say? I can't say anything, you are the one who blooms inside.
A desire that is not dear to me is pulling me away.
Every day, I see you and it feels like a dream.
All my feelings are coming together, and I am feeling overwhelmed.
With love nearby, I will go with you, I won't be left behind.
I will come to you without any hesitation or trouble.
I will save you..
Hey boy, hey boy, what should I say? I can't say anything, you are the one who blooms inside.
Thinking of you makes my hunger disappear.
Even if I think of words to say, they just slip away.
With a thorn in my heart, I want to give you a kiss.
In the midst of happiness, I want to share my joy with you.
In the rush of emotions, I want to hold your hands tightly...
Hey boy, hey boy, what should I say? I can't say anything, you are the one who blooms inside.
What is it that I feel inside? It's not something that can be easily expressed.
When the fire comes, it won't just go away easily.
I was born to you, and I will live together with you.
